description: HTTP response rates, error counts, and authentication failure tracking for Nexus Repository Manager via the metrics data API
technicalNotes: Queries the Nexus Dropwizard metrics JSON endpoint. Tries /service/rest/metrics/data (3.81+) first, then /service/metrics/data (pre-3.81). Requires nx-metrics-all privilege. Response rates use pre-computed m1_rate from Dropwizard meters. Auth failure counts (401, 403) are cumulative counters that LM computes deltas for.
name: Nexus_HTTP_Metrics
